item.title: California Is Winning The Digital Privacy Fight (From 2015)
item.description: One decade ago, California passed the gold standard regulation of law enforcement access to digital data in the United States. The law is still the strongest in the country. It requires that a California government entity get a warrant to search electronic devices or compel access to any electronic information, like email, text messages, do
item.content:encoded: One decade ago, California passed the gold standard regulation of law enforcement access to digital data in the United States. The law is still the strongest in the country. It requires that a California government entity get a warrant to search electronic devices or compel access to any electronic information, like email, text messages, do
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Bitcoin just dropped 6% in a day while ai stocks hit all time highs. Nobody is asking the obvious question.
item.description:
Yesterday btc tumbled below $67k, down nearly 6% in a single session which is lowest level since april. Spot bitcoin etfs recorded $1.42 billion in outflows as investor sentiment turned risk off and meanwhile nvidia closed at an ath, microsoft is up 34% this year and the ai infrastructure trade is printing.

Which means money rotated,investors are moving out of crypto
item.content:encoded:
Yesterday btc tumbled below $67k, down nearly 6% in a single session which is lowest level since april. Spot bitcoin etfs recorded $1.42 billion in outflows as investor sentiment turned risk off and meanwhile nvidia closed at an ath, microsoft is up 34% this year and the ai infrastructure trade is printing.

Which means money rotated,investors are moving out of crypto
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Pentagon Restricts Press Office Access Over Privacy Concerns
item.description:
Pentagon Restricts Press Office Access Over Privacy Concerns

that reporters will no longer have open access to the War Department’s public affairs office after the space was redesignated as a classified facility to accommodate staff handling sensitive material.

The announcement marks the latest effort by the Pete Hegseth-led War Department
item.content:encoded:
Pentagon Restricts Press Office Access Over Privacy Concerns

that reporters will no longer have open access to the War Department’s public affairs office after the space was redesignated as a classified facility to accommodate staff handling sensitive material.

The announcement marks the latest effort by the Pete Hegseth-led War Department
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Teva agrees to pay $35 million to settle asthma inhaler antitrust lawsuit
item.description: Teva agrees to pay $35 million to settle asthma inhaler antitrust lawsuit Reuters
item.content:encoded: Teva agrees to pay $35 million to settle asthma inhaler antitrust lawsuit Reuters
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
item.description: Amazon faces class action lawsuit over Ring facial-recognition feature
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: This is kind of strange.
item.description: Rule 10 Submission Statement: Albania has significant ties to human trafficking; while it serves primarily as a major source country, and to a lesser extent a transit and destination point, for human trafficking. Organized criminal networks frequently traffic Albanian adults and children into forced labor and the sex trade across Europe
item.content:encoded: Rule 10 Submission Statement: Albania has significant ties to human trafficking; while it serves primarily as a major source country, and to a lesser extent a transit and destination point, for human trafficking. Organized criminal networks frequently traffic Albanian adults and children into forced labor and the sex trade across Europe
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: Trump Blasts 'Fake' Reports Of Iran Talks Freeze As Rubio Insists To Congress Tehran Ready To Negotiate Nuclear Curbs
item.description:
Trump Blasts 'Fake' Reports Of Iran Talks Freeze As Rubio Insists To Congress Tehran Ready To Negotiate Nuclear Curbs

Summary:

  • Trump insists reports that Iran & US have not been talking for days is 'fake news'; Rubio also tells Congress talks are ongoing, despite fresh Iranian denials, and even claims the nuclear file is part of it.
  • Washington has seen the Lebanon partial truce as opportunity enough to press forw
item.content:encoded:
Trump Blasts 'Fake' Reports Of Iran Talks Freeze As Rubio Insists To Congress Tehran Ready To Negotiate Nuclear Curbs

Summary:

  • Trump insists reports that Iran & US have not been talking for days is 'fake news'; Rubio also tells Congress talks are ongoing, despite fresh Iranian denials, and even claims the nuclear file is part of it.
  • Washington has seen the Lebanon partial truce as opportunity enough to press forw
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Tencent Soars Most Since 2022 On Report It's Set To Launch AI Agent For China's Most Used App
item.description:
Tencent Soars Most Since 2022 On Report It's Set To Launch AI Agent For China's Most Used App

Tencent shares jumped the most since late 2022 after an reported, citing sources. After that, Tencent plans to test the agent on a small group of outside users before initiating a phased rollout, the newspaper said.

Shares of Tencent closed up 10.5%, its biggest jump since November 2022, with turnover at the highest in more than a year. The stock gave a boost t
item.content:encoded:
Tencent Soars Most Since 2022 On Report It's Set To Launch AI Agent For China's Most Used App

Tencent shares jumped the most since late 2022 after an reported, citing sources. After that, Tencent plans to test the agent on a small group of outside users before initiating a phased rollout, the newspaper said.

Shares of Tencent closed up 10.5%, its biggest jump since November 2022, with turnover at the highest in more than a year. The stock gave a boost t
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Illinois HB 5511 Bill, a bill requiring OS level age verification, passes both houses
item.description: The bill, to see for yourself: I have not seen news that the governor has signed it yet, so if you are an Illinois resident concerned about this, then contact him stating your opposition, but be prepared for this to pass and be in effect in January 1st of next year. If it does pass demand a repeal to your lawmakers, protest, and fund lawsuits towards it. Maybe even tr
item.content:encoded: The bill, to see for yourself: I have not seen news that the governor has signed it yet, so if you are an Illinois resident concerned about this, then contact him stating your opposition, but be prepared for this to pass and be in effect in January 1st of next year. If it does pass demand a repeal to your lawmakers, protest, and fund lawsuits towards it. Maybe even tr
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Tiktok just age restricted me for nothing and I don't want to verify my id
item.description:
I can't even appeal also, the age verification thing is deadass everywhere. Im afraid if I do they gone upload my stuff to some secret dark web service.

Tiktok itself is already very unsecured

I just use that app to slide into females dms and I can't do this because of this

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
I can't even appeal also, the age verification thing is deadass everywhere. Im afraid if I do they gone upload my stuff to some secret dark web service.

Tiktok itself is already very unsecured

I just use that app to slide into females dms and I can't do this because of this

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Sens. Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren push Labor Dept. to scrap proposed rule that brings crypto into 401(k) plans
item.description:
From the article;

In a letter dated June 1 to Acting Secretary of Labor Keith Sonderling, the senators and top Democrat of the House Committee on Education and Workforce, Rep. Robert "Bobby" Scott, said the proposed rule would expose people to more risk.

"The proposed rule would establish a so-called safe harbor for fiduciaries who o
item.content:encoded:
From the article;

In a letter dated June 1 to Acting Secretary of Labor Keith Sonderling, the senators and top Democrat of the House Committee on Education and Workforce, Rep. Robert "Bobby" Scott, said the proposed rule would expose people to more risk.

"The proposed rule would establish a so-called safe harbor for fiduciaries who o
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: A walking tour of surveillance infrastructure in Seattle (2020)
item.description: A walking tour of surveillance infrastructure in Seattle (2020)
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Shake Shack Gets Smoked After Cutting Guidance
item.description:
Shake Shack Gets Smoked After Cutting Guidance

Shake Shack plunged on Tuesday, hitting its lowest levels since November 2023, after the burger chain slashed second-quarter guidance only about a month after issuing it.

Baird analyst David Tarantino said the new outlook is viewed as "incrementally negative" for Shake Shack.

Tarantino noted that management had set an "unusually high bar" for 2Q comparable perfo
item.content:encoded:
Shake Shack Gets Smoked After Cutting Guidance

Shake Shack plunged on Tuesday, hitting its lowest levels since November 2023, after the burger chain slashed second-quarter guidance only about a month after issuing it.

Baird analyst David Tarantino said the new outlook is viewed as "incrementally negative" for Shake Shack.

Tarantino noted that management had set an "unusually high bar" for 2Q comparable perfo
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: 'Crypto Spring': StanChart Sees Ethereum Outperforming As Mt. Gox Moves $739M BTC From Cold Wallets
item.description:
'Crypto Spring': StanChart Sees Ethereum Outperforming As Mt. Gox Moves $739M BTC From Cold Wallets

“Over the past week, we acquired 26,497 ETH,” Bitmine Immersion Technologies Chair, Tom Lee,
item.content:encoded:
'Crypto Spring': StanChart Sees Ethereum Outperforming As Mt. Gox Moves $739M BTC From Cold Wallets

“Over the past week, we acquired 26,497 ETH,” Bitmine Immersion Technologies Chair, Tom Lee,
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Bringing Sexy Back: Victoria's Secret Shoots Higher After Abandoning Woke Ideology
item.description:
Bringing Sexy Back: Victoria's Secret Shoots Higher After Abandoning Woke Ideology

Shares of Victoria's Secret surged a mind-boggling 40% in the U.S. morning cash session after the bras-and-lingerie retailer delivered a stronger-than-expected first quarter, boosted its outlook, and showed signs of a turnaround plan in motion.

Net sales rose 15% to $1.56 billion in the first quarter, beating guidance, while comparable sales increased
item.content:encoded:
Bringing Sexy Back: Victoria's Secret Shoots Higher After Abandoning Woke Ideology

Shares of Victoria's Secret surged a mind-boggling 40% in the U.S. morning cash session after the bras-and-lingerie retailer delivered a stronger-than-expected first quarter, boosted its outlook, and showed signs of a turnaround plan in motion.

Net sales rose 15% to $1.56 billion in the first quarter, beating guidance, while comparable sales increased
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: How Congress’s Extension of Section 702 May Expand the NSA’s Warrantless Surveillance Authority
item.description: How Congress’s Extension of Section 702 May Expand the NSA’s Warrantless Surveillance Authority Electronic Frontier Foundation
item.content:encoded: How Congress’s Extension of Section 702 May Expand the NSA’s Warrantless Surveillance Authority Electronic Frontier Foundation
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: 30-Year-Old Murder Solved
item.description: 30-Year-Old Murder Solved Federal Bureau of Investigation (.gov)

item.title: Russia Unleashes Its Threatened Mass Bombardment: At Least 18 Killed, Over 100 Wounded Across Ukraine
item.description:
Russia Unleashes Its Threatened Mass Bombardment: At Least 18 Killed, Over 100 Wounded Across Ukraine

The Kremlin spent much of the last week warning foreign diplomats and bystanders to evacuate Ukraine's capital, warning that an escalation in airstrikes is imminent, in response to Ukraine's own drone swarms sent against Moscow and other Russian sites last month - especially the "In response to terrorist attacks by the Kyiv regime, the Russian Armed Forces launched a
item.content:encoded:
Russia Unleashes Its Threatened Mass Bombardment: At Least 18 Killed, Over 100 Wounded Across Ukraine

The Kremlin spent much of the last week warning foreign diplomats and bystanders to evacuate Ukraine's capital, warning that an escalation in airstrikes is imminent, in response to Ukraine's own drone swarms sent against Moscow and other Russian sites last month - especially the "In response to terrorist attacks by the Kyiv regime, the Russian Armed Forces launched a
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Oil Spikes As Iran Denies Progress Despite Hasty Lebanon Truce: US Talks Halted For 'At Least A Few Days'
item.description:
Oil Spikes As Iran Denies Progress Despite Hasty Lebanon Truce: US Talks Halted For 'At Least A Few Days'

Summary:

  • Washington has seen the Lebanon partial truce as opportunity enough to press forward on broader talks, with Trump saying he expects a broader Iran deal "over the next week".
  • But Fars denies this Tuesday: "exchange of messages between Iran & the US has been stopped for at least a few days" on MOU
item.content:encoded:
Oil Spikes As Iran Denies Progress Despite Hasty Lebanon Truce: US Talks Halted For 'At Least A Few Days'

Summary:

  • Washington has seen the Lebanon partial truce as opportunity enough to press forward on broader talks, with Trump saying he expects a broader Iran deal "over the next week".
  • But Fars denies this Tuesday: "exchange of messages between Iran & the US has been stopped for at least a few days" on MOU
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Europe Has "Serious, Really Serious Problems" If US Cuts Oil Exports, Currie
item.description:
Europe Has "Serious, Really Serious Problems" If US Cuts Oil Exports, Currie

Last night, the Abaxx Markets’ Jeff Currie and Veriten’s Arjun Murti joined Real Vision's Ash Bennington for a ZeroHedge Debate on what the oil market is getting wrong.

Surprise surprise… the EU is not looking good. But the U.S. may be in trouble too. Currie doubled down on his reserves-to-run-dry-by-July call.

The
item.content:encoded:
Europe Has "Serious, Really Serious Problems" If US Cuts Oil Exports, Currie

Last night, the Abaxx Markets’ Jeff Currie and Veriten’s Arjun Murti joined Real Vision's Ash Bennington for a ZeroHedge Debate on what the oil market is getting wrong.

Surprise surprise… the EU is not looking good. But the U.S. may be in trouble too. Currie doubled down on his reserves-to-run-dry-by-July call.

The
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Privacy isn't dead: it's just that tech companies have made it inconvenient
item.description: Privacy isn't dead: it's just that tech companies have made it inconvenient
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: London Bans Israel Critics Hassan Piker, Cenk Uyghur From Entering UK
item.description:
London Bans Israel Critics Hassan Piker, Cenk Uyghur From Entering UK

The UK has revoked my visa as well. All at the behest of Israel. The west is betraying ‘liberal values’ for a genocidal fascist foreign government. Soon we will all become Israel," Piker said on X
item.content:encoded:
London Bans Israel Critics Hassan Piker, Cenk Uyghur From Entering UK

The UK has revoked my visa as well. All at the behest of Israel. The west is betraying ‘liberal values’ for a genocidal fascist foreign government. Soon we will all become Israel," Piker said on X
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Europe’s geopolitical awakening has begun
item.description: Europe’s geopolitical awakening has begun Engelsberg Ideas
item.content:encoded: Europe’s geopolitical awakening has begun Engelsberg Ideas
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Florida Becomes First State To Sue "Unsafe" OpenAI And Sam Altman Over AI Harms
item.description:
Florida Becomes First State To Sue "Unsafe" OpenAI And Sam Altman Over AI Harms

OpenAI no longer has to worry about being last in the AI IPO race and lagging ARRs when compared to Anthropic, not to mention a potential Supreme Court showdown against Elon Musk (pending appeal). Earlier today, Florida became the first state to file a lawsuit against OpenAI and its chief executive, Sam Altman, launching a new broadside in a growing rebellion against the alleged safety failings
item.content:encoded:
Florida Becomes First State To Sue "Unsafe" OpenAI And Sam Altman Over AI Harms

OpenAI no longer has to worry about being last in the AI IPO race and lagging ARRs when compared to Anthropic, not to mention a potential Supreme Court showdown against Elon Musk (pending appeal). Earlier today, Florida became the first state to file a lawsuit against OpenAI and its chief executive, Sam Altman, launching a new broadside in a growing rebellion against the alleged safety failings
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Indian Refiners Freeze Domestic Jet Fuel Prices
item.description:
Indian Refiners Freeze Domestic Jet Fuel Prices

Indian refiners have frozen the price of jet fuel for domestic flights after

In an additional concession to airlines, Indian fuel makers also reduced the price of jet fuel for international flights, the report also said, citing unnamed spokespeople from state-owned refiners.

Indian Oil Corp., Bharat Petroleum Corp, and Hindust
item.content:encoded:
Indian Refiners Freeze Domestic Jet Fuel Prices

Indian refiners have frozen the price of jet fuel for domestic flights after

In an additional concession to airlines, Indian fuel makers also reduced the price of jet fuel for international flights, the report also said, citing unnamed spokespeople from state-owned refiners.

Indian Oil Corp., Bharat Petroleum Corp, and Hindust
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Mystery Deepens: Remains Of Missing Los Alamos Nuclear Lab Employee Discovered In Forest
item.description:
Mystery Deepens: Remains Of Missing Los Alamos Nuclear Lab Employee Discovered In Forest

This discovery marks another chapter in the disturbing wave of deaths and disappearances involving individuals tied to highly sensitive government programs. It arrives after President Trump ordered full UFO disclosure and two sets of classified files have now be
item.content:encoded:
Mystery Deepens: Remains Of Missing Los Alamos Nuclear Lab Employee Discovered In Forest

This discovery marks another chapter in the disturbing wave of deaths and disappearances involving individuals tied to highly sensitive government programs. It arrives after President Trump ordered full UFO disclosure and two sets of classified files have now be
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: Hiker discovers body of missing New Mexico nuclear lab worker, police say - Melissa Casias was among those flagged by FBI and House Oversight investigations into nuclear-linked disappearances
item.description: submitted by
item.content:encoded: submitted by
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: The Science is Not Settled: How Weak Evidence is Fueling a National Push to Ban Social Media for Youth
item.description: Independent researchers, including developmental psychologists from institutions like the University of California, Irvine, and Brown University, have repeatedly found that the evidence for such claims is mixed, blurry, and often contradictory. Large-scale meta-analyses covering dozens of countries have failed to show a consistent, measurable association between the rollout
item.content:encoded: Independent researchers, including developmental psychologists from institutions like the University of California, Irvine, and Brown University, have repeatedly found that the evidence for such claims is mixed, blurry, and often contradictory. Large-scale meta-analyses covering dozens of countries have failed to show a consistent, measurable association between the rollout
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Normies supporting ID verification
item.description:
small rant, but I get so upset every time I try to warn about ID verification and face scans.

and people support it or brush it off. The fact that there is the chilling effect, mass surveillance and data leak risks. And so many leaks right there for them to see

they still sport or brush it off. and call me paranoid sometimes. No wonder why governments can pus
item.content:encoded:
small rant, but I get so upset every time I try to warn about ID verification and face scans.

and people support it or brush it off. The fact that there is the chilling effect, mass surveillance and data leak risks. And so many leaks right there for them to see

they still sport or brush it off. and call me paranoid sometimes. No wonder why governments can pus
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Florida AG files lawsuit against OpenAI, CEO Sam Altman for deceptive practices
item.description: Florida AG files lawsuit against OpenAI, CEO Sam Altman for deceptive practices
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump: Hezbollah Agrees Shooting Will Stop & Israel Will Avert Attack On Beirut
item.description:
Trump: Hezbollah Agrees Shooting Will Stop & Israel Will Avert Attack On Beirut

Update(1335ET): In a rare development, Iran itself is now issuing warnings for northern Israel. Tehran is saying that if Beirut comes under fresh Israeli attack, then new assaults on northern Israeli settlements will in turn be unleashed:

Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has warned residents of northern Israel to leave the area
item.content:encoded:
Trump: Hezbollah Agrees Shooting Will Stop & Israel Will Avert Attack On Beirut

Update(1335ET): In a rare development, Iran itself is now issuing warnings for northern Israel. Tehran is saying that if Beirut comes under fresh Israeli attack, then new assaults on northern Israeli settlements will in turn be unleashed:

Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has warned residents of northern Israel to leave the area
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: French Commandos Board & Seize 4th Russian 'Shadow Fleet' Vessel Since September
item.description:
French Commandos Board & Seize 4th Russian 'Shadow Fleet' Vessel Since September

France announced Monday another weekend interdiction of a Russian "shadow fleet" vessel in international waters near its coast. The French Navy boarded and detained a sanctioned oil tanker, President Emmanuel Macron announced Monday, in an operation which had the assistance from the UK Royal Navy and other allies.

This marks the fourth time since September that French commandoes
item.content:encoded:
French Commandos Board & Seize 4th Russian 'Shadow Fleet' Vessel Since September

France announced Monday another weekend interdiction of a Russian "shadow fleet" vessel in international waters near its coast. The French Navy boarded and detained a sanctioned oil tanker, President Emmanuel Macron announced Monday, in an operation which had the assistance from the UK Royal Navy and other allies.

This marks the fourth time since September that French commandoes
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

Shannon O’Connor, 52, threw these parties for two years and discouraged teens, who were mostly 14 an

item.title: "Working Better": Saylor Teases BTC Buy After Strategy Sells For First Time Since 2022
item.description:
"Working Better": Saylor Teases BTC Buy After Strategy Sells For First Time Since 2022

Bitcoin is extending its recent weakness overnight (hurt by US-Iran tensions escalating again), trading back below its 100DMA after Strategy (MSTR) sold 32 bitcoin between May 26 and May 31 at an average net price of $77,135 a coin, totaling $2.5 million (

Proceeds from the bit
item.content:encoded:

US Adult Cigarette Smoking Rate Hits Another All-Time Low

Via

Cigarette smoking is a risk factor for lung cancer, heart disease and stroke, and it’s long been considered from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention were based on survey responses from more than 24,200 adults. In the survey, CDC officials defined current ci
item.content:encoded:

item.title: SK Hynix Evacuates Thousands Of Workers At Chip Plant After Fire, Toxic Gas Leak
item.description:
SK Hynix Evacuates Thousands Of Workers At Chip Plant After Fire, Toxic Gas Leak

One week, unions are threatening have already pushed memory chip supply into extraordinarily tight territory.

South Korea's main national wire service,

The fire erupted Monday mid-morning in a sixth-floor gas room connecting the M15 and M15X
item.content:encoded:
SK Hynix Evacuates Thousands Of Workers At Chip Plant After Fire, Toxic Gas Leak

One week, unions are threatening have already pushed memory chip supply into extraordinarily tight territory.

South Korea's main national wire service,

The fire erupted Monday mid-morning in a sixth-floor gas room connecting the M15 and M15X
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump Toughens Terms Of Iran Deal Framework, As Bessent Pinpoints Tehran's 'Big Mistake'
item.description:
Trump Toughens Terms Of Iran Deal Framework, As Bessent Pinpoints Tehran's 'Big Mistake'

Summary

  • NYT on Sunday: President Trump has toughened the terms of a potential framework for a deal to end the war in Iran.
  • Washington seeks to ratchet pressure, but Tehran still not budging on issue of remaining nuclear material.
  • Bessent describes the "big mis
item.content:encoded:
Trump Toughens Terms Of Iran Deal Framework, As Bessent Pinpoints Tehran's 'Big Mistake'

Summary

  • NYT on Sunday: President Trump has toughened the terms of a potential framework for a deal to end the war in Iran.
  • Washington seeks to ratchet pressure, but Tehran still not budging on issue of remaining nuclear material.
  • Bessent describes the "big mis

item.title: Aww... Look At The Cute Dancing-Robot Police-State Surveillance-Dog...
item.description:
Aww... Look At The Cute Dancing-Robot Police-State Surveillance-Dog...

The company has stated that the machines “will be used to assist security personnel with investigating things like suspicious packages or other potentially hazardous materials.”

These four-legged fiends are set to roam, and even dance (oh how cute) around AT&T Stadium in Dalla
item.content:encoded:
Aww... Look At The Cute Dancing-Robot Police-State Surveillance-Dog...

The company has stated that the machines “will be used to assist security personnel with investigating things like suspicious packages or other potentially hazardous materials.”

These four-legged fiends are set to roam, and even dance (oh how cute) around AT&T Stadium in Dalla

item.title: The Slow Disappearance Of Cash In Europe
item.description:
The Slow Disappearance Of Cash In Europe

Authored by Cláudia Ascensão Nunes via the

Starting in July 2027, Europeans will no longer be allowed to pay businesses or professionals , applies directly to all Member States. Under the pretext of fighting money laundering, Brussels is imposing yet another form of forced
item.content:encoded:

Starting in July 2027, Europeans will no longer be allowed to pay businesses or professionals , applies directly to all Member States. Under the pretext of fighting money laundering, Brussels is imposing yet another form of forced
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: defunding privacy in medical care
item.description:
The Drey Dossier is diligently researched and is not a conspiracy site.

The Dangerous World of Biotech Wearables, from the Drey Dossier is on youtube and explains the surveillance tech we're getting instead of healthcare. Weirdly, the federal government is rolling out these wearables to states in exchange for giving up access to hospitals, nurses,
item.content:encoded:
The Drey Dossier is diligently researched and is not a conspiracy site.

The Dangerous World of Biotech Wearables, from the Drey Dossier is on youtube and explains the surveillance tech we're getting instead of healthcare. Weirdly, the federal government is rolling out these wearables to states in exchange for giving up access to hospitals, nurses,
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: California Chemical Tank Emergency At F-35 Supplier Comes Amid Far-Left Campaign Against Defense Firms
item.description:
California Chemical Tank Emergency At F-35 Supplier Comes Amid Far-Left Campaign Against Defense Firms

By the end of last week, dozens of lawsuits had been filed against GKN Aerospace after a tank explosion risk at its Garden Grove, California, facility across Garden Grove, Anaheim, Stanton, Buena Park, Cypress, and Westminster.

Local authorities lifted the final evacuation orders last Tuesday after pressure inside the tank stabi
item.content:encoded:
California Chemical Tank Emergency At F-35 Supplier Comes Amid Far-Left Campaign Against Defense Firms

By the end of last week, dozens of lawsuits had been filed against GKN Aerospace after a tank explosion risk at its Garden Grove, California, facility across Garden Grove, Anaheim, Stanton, Buena Park, Cypress, and Westminster.

Local authorities lifted the final evacuation orders last Tuesday after pressure inside the tank stabi
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves
